title: Responsive Stats Counter

statement.markdown:
# Responsive Stats Counter

## A challenge that tests your skills in creating a responsive stats counter that adapts to different screen sizes.
requirements
1. The stats counter should have 4 different stats: followers, views, likes, and comments.
2. Each stat should have a unique color and be displayed in a responsive grid layout.
3. The stats counter should be fully responsive and work well on both mobile and desktop devices.
4. The stats counter should use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
The stats counter should work well on both mobile and desktop devices.
The stats counter should be fully responsive.

starterCode.css: /* Add any necessary CSS here before the solution is submitted */

gradingCriteria.description: The stats counter has 4 different stats with unique colors.
The stats counter is displayed in a responsive grid layout.
The stats counter works well on both mobile and desktop devices.
The stats counter uses Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
